items.title: Raydium DEX says $1.34 million exploit hit retired AMM program, treasury to cover losses
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $1.34 million exploit on Raydium's retired AMM program raises concerns about security, potentially impacting user trust and liquidity in Solana's DeFi ecosystem.

items.title: Solana Sponsors the World Series of Poker, Enabling Crypto Entry Fees and Payouts
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's sponsorship of the World Series of Poker enhances its visibility and credibility, potentially attracting new users and increasing transaction volume within its ecosystem.

items.title: World Series of Poker adds Solana payments for tournament buy-ins
items.whyYouShouldCare: The integration of Solana payments for tournament buy-ins at the World Series of Poker could drive adoption and usage of SOL, boosting its market presence.
